overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic neon-lit city street transitioning to a waterfront promenade at sunset. The scene features tall glass buildings, holographic advertisements, palm trees, and a mix of artificial neon and natural sunset lighting before returning to the urban area.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic commercial street with neon billboards and palm trees

events.description: slight turn to the right while approaching the digital holographic pillar
passing by pedestrians walking in scattered directions

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the city sidewalk past palm trees and neon signs, approaching the open plaza

notable_agents.action: person in dark clothing walking ahead toward the plaza

entered.detail: tall cylindrical structure displaying cyan holographic advertisements and palm tree imagery
tall modern building with illuminated glass windows and vertical lighting strips
large red digital billboard displaying 'ZEUS DICH' text with graphic imagery
tall palm trees lining the pedestrian walkway in square planters

segments.scene_description: Walking along a futuristic commercial street lined with palm trees and towering glass buildings. The digital holographic pillar displays cyan advertisements in the center of the path while neon signs illuminate the surroundings. Sparse pedestrians walk in various directions and cars move along the street to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront plaza transition with sunset view opening up

events.description: exiting the covered urban street into the open waterfront plaza
dramatic shift from artificial neon lighting to bright natural sunset backlighting

agents.ego_description: walking toward the open waterfront area as the environment transitions from urban canyon to open plaza

notable_agents.action: person in light-colored jacket walking ahead toward the waterfront railing

entered.detail: large curved terraced building with horizontal lines and 'EMPEROR' signage visible on upper levels
low railing marking the edge of the plaza overlooking the water
landmass visible across the water against the sunset horizon

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up from the urban street into a wide waterfront plaza. The curved modern building dominates the right side while the bright sunset creates strong backlighting over the water. The digital pillar moves to the left as the camera advances toward the railing, with the wet pavement reflecting the golden light.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade with outdoor seating and sunset views

events.description: slight turn to the left while walking along the waterfront railing
slowing pace and beginning to turn around to head back toward the city

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront promenade enjoying the sunset view over the water and distant islands

entered.detail: wooden deck structures with tables and benches positioned near the water edge

segments.scene_description: Walking along the waterfront promenade with the curved modern building now close on the right. The wet reflective pavement mirrors the bright sunset sky. Outdoor seating decks line the water's edge overlooking the distant islands. The camera moves slowly along the railing before beginning to turn back toward the urban area.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza near street with parked vehicles and large digital billboards

events.description: turning left to head back toward the urban street and covered building area
approaching a parked black sedan near the building entrance with red overhead signage

agents.ego_description: turning back from the waterfront and walking toward the urban street with parked vehicles and neon billboards

notable_agents.action: black sedan parked near the building entrance beneath the red digital billboard

entered.detail: dark colored four-door sedan parked on the plaza near the building entrance
large red digital billboard with 'ZEUS DICH' text visible again when returning to the street area

segments.scene_description: Turning away from the waterfront and walking back toward the urban street. The scene returns to mixed lighting with shadows from the building and red neon billboards overhead. A black sedan is parked near the entrance as the camera approaches the covered area, with the curved modern building now visible in the distance on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dense, neon-lit commercial corridor into a wide, sun-drenched waterfront plaza. It begins by gliding along a futuristic street lined with palm trees and towering glass buildings, passing a cyan holographic pillar and sparse pedestrians under the glow of neon signs. As the camera advances, the urban enclosure opens up, shifting the digital pillar to the left to reveal a vast open space. The scene then expands toward a curved modern building on the right, where the artificial city lights give way to a bright sunset that creates strong backlighting over the water. Finally, the camera approaches the waterfront railing, moving across wet pavement that reflects the shifting golden light of the horizon.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a bright, open waterfront promenade back into the shadowed corridors of a neon-lit urban district. It begins by gliding along a railing beside a curved modern building, where wet reflective pavement mirrors the vibrant colors of a sunset sky and outdoor seating decks overlook distant islands. As the camera slowly turns away from the water's edge, the open horizon recedes and the lighting shifts from natural gold to a mix of deep shadows and red neon billboards. The scene then moves toward a covered area where a black sedan is parked, finally returning to the dense city street with the modern building now visible in the distance.
